title: Things to know before your visit.
subtitle: Have a question? Find quick answers below or reach out to us directly.

items.question: Is Aaradhya Grand a pure vegetarian restaurant?
items.answer: Yes! We are a 100% pure vegetarian restaurant. Our entire menu is completely vegetarian with vegan options available.

items.question: What are your operating hours?
items.answer: We are open every day from early morning to 11:00 PM. We serve breakfast, brunch, lunch, and dinner throughout the day.

items.question: Do you accept reservations?
items.answer: Yes, we accept reservations. Brunch and lunch reservations are recommended. Call us at +91 81970 06999 to book.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes! We have plenty of parking including a free parking lot and free street parking. Paid parking options also available.

items.question: Do you offer delivery and drive-through?
items.answer: Yes, we offer dine-in, outdoor seating, drive-through, no-contact delivery, on-site services, and takeaway options.

items.question: Is the restaurant wheelchair accessible?
items.answer: Yes, we are fully wheelchair accessible — including car park, entrance, seating areas, and restrooms.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments in addition to cash.

items.question: Is it suitable for kids?
items.answer: Absolutely! We're good for kids and kids' birthdays. The atmosphere is family-friendly and casual.

items.question: Are dogs allowed?
items.answer: Yes, dogs are allowed in our outdoor seating area.

items.question: Do you have a party hall?
items.answer: Yes! We have a party hall available for private events, celebrations, and group gatherings. Contact us for bookings.

items.question: Do you have another branch?
items.answer: Yes! Our Devanahalli branch is located at BB Rd, near Nandi Cross NH75, Devanahalli, Kurubarakunte, Bangalore. Call +91 935132901.
